_label_note: US Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered role/legal mailbox bait, public privacy/ethics helplines, generic training-list wording, negated material-adverse-effect wording, Reg FD/10b/Phase shorthand amount bait, placeholder account IDs, entity registry numbers, and public/generic material-event guidance.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text:
To: Board Compliance Committee; From: Ms. Rhea Colson, Chief Legal Officer, Arboris HealthBank, Inc.; Subject: Re g F D/Rule 10b‑5 controls for Q2; Date: 2026‑06‑03
As a U.S. issuer, the Company will observe a trading blackout from 2026‑07‑01 through two full trading days after our Q2 release (scheduled 2026‑07‑23, 4:10 p.m. ET); see http://intra.arborishealthbank.local/ir/blackout?ref=f d _Q2_2026.
MNPI examples (do not disclose selectively): preliminary net interest margin compression of 18–22 bps QoQ; Phase 2b signal for Trial NL‑P2b‑h3x/0 9 showing 41% ORR vs 28% plan; bank liquidity coverage ratio running above a 110% internal threshold; QTD in‑patient census +2.4% v. plan; none of these are in MD&A drafts.
Public references that may be cited: the 2026‑05‑01 press release and Form 8‑K (Item 2.02) furnishing HSA enrollment trends, and the 2026‑05‑15 Form 8‑K (Item 7.01) describing our community branch consolidation—re‑use is permitted as “public.”
Negative clarification: this memo does not constitute, and should not be read as, a MAC, nor does it amend compensation policy or vendor terms.
Selective disclosure risk: at the 2026‑06‑05 one‑on‑one with Mr. Ivo Karr of Redpeak Analytics LLC, IR may not share non‑public unit economics, clinical cohort deltas, or credit metrics; if a non‑intentional disclosure occurs, furnish a corrective Form 8‑K under Item 7.01 by the later of 24 hours or the start of the next trading day.
Healthcare privacy: do not share any patient names, MRNs, DOBs, or addresses; use de‑identification (e.g., Pt p‑3 9 1‑AX) and aggregated cohorts; HIPAA‑safe harbor applies to data release cadence, but m a t e r i a l service‑line shifts remain MNPI.
Banking privacy: GLBA limits sharing customer nonpublic personal info; no account numbers in any external channel (internal shorthand like Acct ****0 9 3 4 is permitted only within need‑to‑know).
The 2024 shelf registration and risk factors are publicly available; citing those or the 2019 annual report’s HSA pilot note is fine but may be stale and should not be presented as current guidance.
Do not discuss unannounced payor contract renewals, undisclosed credit policy tweaks, or preliminary device adverse‑event rates; these are issuer‑relative material and non‑public.
Non‑issuer operational update: Gryphon Courier’s delivery window change is not a disclosure topic and is not material to the Company.
Analyst outreach via private chat platforms is prohibited for MNPI; use the webcast and press release for broad, non‑exclusionary distribution; http://intra.arborishealthbank.local/p/ir/regfd?d=8k_7%2E01&v=
